targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS value FROM stripe_olap.fact_transaction WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
SELECT sum(amount_eur) AS value FROM stripe_olap.fact_transaction WHERE status = 'succeeded' AND created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
SELECT avgIf(1, status='succeeded') * 100 AS value FROM stripe_olap.fact_transaction WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
SELECT countIf(fraud_score > 0.7) / count() * 100 AS value FROM stripe_olap.fact_transaction WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
SELECT toStartOfHour(created_at) AS time, sum(amount_eur) AS revenue FROM stripe_olap.fact_transaction WHERE status='succeeded' AND created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT country_code, sum(gross_revenue_eur) AS revenue FROM stripe_olap.fact_daily_revenue WHERE toDate(date_id) >= today() - 7 GROUP BY country_code ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10
